race.comment: If WISE INLAW (3) can repeat what he did over this track and distance last start they'll struggle to beat him. He came back to the 1200m and was explosive late to score by two lengths having just been found wanting over 1400m prior. Drawn wide again suits, he gets a smart claim and can make it a double. HIGH ON THE HILL (5) backs up from that tough track at Caulfield last week where he ran very well but was just no match for the widest runner, a theme across most of the day. If he backs up fine he'll take beating again. SNALLYGASTER (6) comes over from Adelaide with good form lines, second to HIGH ON THE HILL two back before winning well against the older horses last time. He should give a sight. Wary of BIOLOGICS (8) who came clear late to win under a big weight first up. She'd always shown good ability and drops 6kg here.
